title: Signature Parameter
text: Signature Parameter A Signature Parameter is a Development Object that describes an argument that can be passed in or out of an operation. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: opr Main Development Object? No Part of: Signature Operation Contains: Property Generalization: Development Object Specializations: — Compilation Output: — URI format: sig: SignatureName :opr: OperationName Specialization Signature Parameter specializes Development Object in the following ways: It has a Signature Operation as parent object. It has no child development objects and no code containers. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
